question:
How often should you check the tires if your placarded trailer has dual tires?
1) Check tires every 4 hours or 200 miles
2) Check tires every hour or 75 miles
3) Check tires every 2 hours or 100 miles
4) Check tires every 3 hours or 150 miles
canonical_answer: Check tires every 2 hours or 100 miles

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: Check tires every 2 hours or 100 miles

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: Check tires every 2 hours or 100 miles

appears_in.title: Hazmat Test Nj
appears_in.answer: Check tires every 2 hours or 100 miles

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: Check tires every 2 hours or 100 miles

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Test Answers
appears_in.answer: Check tires every 2 hours or 100 miles
